CheckTitle: Ensure agent blueprints do not use allAllowedScopes inheritance
Description: Checks whether any agent identity blueprint has inheritablePermissions configured with allAllowedScopes, which allows agent instances to inherit any permission without explicit enumeration.
Risk: A blueprint using allAllowedScopes grants agent instances carte-blanche to inherit any permission the blueprint is authorized for. This defeats least-privilege governance and makes it impossible to predict what permissions agent instances will acquire.

Remediation.Recommendation: Update the blueprint's inheritablePermissions to use enumeratedScopes with an explicit list of allowed permission scopes, or noScopes if agents should not inherit permissions automatically.

SourceNotes: The scopeCollectionKind value 'allAllowedScopes' is the most permissive option for inheritable permissions.
